hero.title: André Esteves
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Engineer | Bringing Ideas to Life

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: I'm a full-stack engineer who enjoys turning interesting ideas into professional, fully functional products. I focus on clean architecture, best practices, and delivery that works.
about.p2: With experience across front-end and back-end, I bring ideas to life with solid code, no shortcuts. I prioritize maintainability, performance, and solutions that scale.
about.p3: I'm always on the lookout for new ideas to bring to market and turn into real products.

0.title: E-Commerce Platform

1.title: AI Chat Application
1.description: Real-time AI-powered chat application with natural language processing and contextual responses.

2.title: Analytics Dashboard
2.description: Interactive data visualization dashboard with real-time metrics, custom charts, and exportable reports.

3.title: Mobile Fitness App
3.description: Cross-platform fitness tracking application with workout planning, progress tracking, and social features.
